title: CleanSpark Reports Record-Breaking FY 2024 Results
text: CleanSpark, Inc. (NASDAQ: CLSK) announced impressive financial results for fiscal year 2024, demonstrating substantial growth despite challenging industry conditions. The bitcoin mining company achieved remarkable revenue expansion, with total revenues reaching $378.9 million, representing a 125% year-over-year increase from $168.4 million in the prior fiscal year. This growth outpaced significant industry headwinds, including the fourth Bitcoin halving event in the cryptocurrency's history. CleanSpark's hashrate performance exceeded expectations. The company currently operates at 33.5 EH/s with targets to reach 37 exahashes per second by year-end 2024 and 50 EH/s during 2025. Despite the halving event reducing block rewards, the mining operation produced approximately 7,100 Bitcoin during the fiscal year. The company expanded its operational infrastructure substantially, adding 423 megawatts of capacity to reach 726 MW total operating portfolio through both acquisitions and organic growth. CleanSpark reported a net loss of $145.8 million, though adjusted EBITDA improved dramatically to $245.8 million from $25.0 million in the previous year. The balance sheet strengthened considerably, with $122.2 million in cash and 8,049 Bitcoin holdings valued at approximately $509.5 million. Total assets reached $2.0 billion. Despite the positive operational metrics, the stock declined 3.93% on the announcement date, suggesting investor caution regarding profitability challenges.
